#   glyphplotter --input 0448.txt --output 0448.svg \

fontSize 1100
labelFontSize 200
fillColor FFFFFF
drawBackground
fillColor 000000

# ==== Box: U+0448
strokeWidth 20
strokeColor 9E9E9E
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 332 0 /uni0448
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+0448"
move 1400
